Package Index | Class Index
Summary: Methods | Inherited Methods | [Expand All]
public static interface

FunctionalUtils.ThrowingSupplier

implements Supplier<T>
com.android.internal.util.FunctionalUtils.ThrowingSupplier<T>

Class Overview

An equivalent of Supplier that allows throwing checked exceptions This can be used to specify a lambda argument without forcing all the checked exceptions to be handled within it

Summary

Public Methods
default T get()
abstract T getOrThrow()
